_source: WFRP 4e Core Rulebook p.38 — Class Trappings section
_notes: Items that are 'contained in' a bag/pack are listed individually alongside the container.
1d10 Sheets of Parchment: actual quantity rolled at character creation; stored as the string literal here.
1d10 Matches: same — rolled at character creation.
Hood or Mask (Rogues): player chooses one at creation; stored as a single choice-string.
Pouch (Courtiers): in the rulebook the Pouch contains Tweezers, Ear Pick, and Comb — items listed individually.
Class names match Career.careerClass values in careers.json: Academic, Burghers, Courtier, Peasant, Ranger, Riverfolk, Rogue, Warrior.
